title: Bossominium
description: A mod that adds multiple new bosses that bring a challenge
body:
![Bossominium Banner](https://i.imgur.com/Nu47OWN.png)

**NOTE: This mod will no longer be updated due to the original files being corrupeted, thank you all for the great support this mod has gotten, this mod has had a great run**
## **Introduction**

The Bossominium mod is a mod that adds multiple bosses into the game. All these bosses have unique item drops that you could use for various items. The items you want to craft depend on your playstyle, if you want to craft an offensive item you can, if you want to craft a defensive item you can. The choices are up to you

Currently there are 23 bosses, and 46 achievements. To suggest features for this mod, use this [forum](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1X1wxzmQD8VIb5gNAthtn0dLqwmG7iPn0yTIBqeEMiIo/edit)

This mod **REQUIRES** [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to work
# 
# Starting

At the start of any world, you'll be granted with a new item, The Bossdexium. This item is a guide on how to summon all the bosses below. This item also has a crafting recipe if you lost the original.
![BossdexiumRecipe](https://i.imgur.com/zm9BbUH.jpg)

Almost 300,000 Downloads on [CurseForge!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bossominium)
